TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_qlyan, title = qlyan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/qlyan} }

S.FORM: qlyan mhgan lru mawa cikay lga musa qlyan kayal. qmisan kayal ga Mhelaw qlyan.
qlyan mhgan lru mawa cikay lga musa qlyan kayal. qmisan kayal ga Mhelaw qlyan.
S.PHON: qljan mħɣan lru mawa ʦ~ʨikaj lɣa mus~ɕa qljan kajal. qmis~ɕan kajal ɣa mħelaw qljan.
